profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk provides financing services in Indonesia. The company offers finances to passenger and commercial vehicles, as well as heavy equipment, including excavators, bulldozers, and others. It provides services through agents and distributors. The company was formerly known as PT KIA Asia Finance and changed its name to PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk in February 2002. PT Trust Finance Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
